title: 関連度と距離で空間を区切る (Dendrogram Heatmap)
chart_name: デンドログラム付きヒートマップ
novelty_reason: 通常のヒートマップに、行・列それぞれの階層的クラスタリング結果を示すデンドログラムを付け、似たパターン同士が近くに並ぶように再配置して構造を浮かび上がらせます。
why_it_works: 値そのものだけでなく、行同士・列同士の距離に基づいて順序を自動最適化するため、ランダムな並びでは見えないブロック構造や相関クラスタが一目で分かります。
how_to_read: 中央のヒートマップの色が各セルの値の大きさを示します。
上と左の枝分かれした木がデンドログラムで、低い位置で結合するほど似ていることを示します。
大きな色の塊や帯が見えたら、それが似た行・列のクラスタです。
use_cases: 遺伝子発現プロファイルのクラスタ分析
顧客や商品の行動パターンのグルーピング
センサーマトリクスや相関行列の構造把握
transform_js: function toNumberMatrix(m){var out=[];for(var i=0;i<m.length;i++){var row=[];for(var j=0;j<m[i].length;j++){row.push(Number(m[i][j]));}out.push(row);}return out;} function transpose(m){var out=[];for(var j=0;j<m[0].length;j++){var col=[];for(var i=0;i<m.length;i++){col.push(m[i][j]);}out.push(col);}return out;} function mean(a){var s=0;for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){s+=a[i];}return a.length?s/a.length:0;} function std(a,m){var s=0;for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var d=a[i]-m;s+=d*d;}return a.length>1?Math.sqrt(s/(a.length-1)):0;} function normalizeVectors(vectors){var out=[];for(var i=0;i<vectors.length;i++){var v=vectors[i];var m=mean(v);var sd=std(v,m);var row=[];for(var j=0;j<v.length;j++){row.push(sd>1e-12?(v[j]-m)/sd:0);}out.push(row);}return out;} function pearsonDistance(a,b){var ma=mean(a),mb=mean(b),num=0,da=0,db=0;for(var i=0;i<a.length;i++){var xa=a[i]-ma;var xb=b[i]-mb;num+=xa*xb;da+=xa*xa;db+=xb*xb;} if(da<=1e-12||db<=1e-12){var s=0;for(var k=0;k<a.length;k++){var d=a[k]-b[k];s+=d*d;}return Math.sqrt(s);} var corr=num/Math.sqrt(da*db); if(corr>1)corr=1; if(corr<-1)corr=-1; return 1-corr;} function buildBaseDistance(vectors){var n=vectors.length;var d=[];for(var i=0;i<n;i++){d[i]=[];for(var j=0;j<n;j++){d[i][j]=i===j?0:pearsonDistance(vectors[i],vectors[j]);}}return d;} function averageClusterDistance(c1,c2,dist){var sum=0,cnt=0;for(var i=0;i<c1.indices.length;i++){for(var j=0;j<c2.indices.length;j++){sum+=dist[c1.indices[i]][c2.indices[j]];cnt++;}}return cnt?sum/cnt:0;} function buildTree(vectors){var dist=buildBaseDistance(vectors);var clusters=[];var nextId=0;for(var i=0;i<vectors.length;i++){clusters.push({id:nextId++,leaf:true,index:i,indices:[i],height:0,minIndex:i});} if(clusters.length===1){return clusters[0];} while(clusters.length>1){var bi=0,bj=1,best=averageClusterDistance(clusters[0],clusters[1],dist);for(var i=0;i<clusters.length;i++){for(var j=i+1;j<clusters.length;j++){var cd=averageClusterDistance(clusters[i],clusters[j],dist);if(cd<best){best=cd;bi=i;bj=j;}}} var a=clusters[bi],b=clusters[bj]; if(a.minIndex>b.minIndex){var t=a;a=b;b=t;} var merged={id:nextId++,leaf:false,left:a,right:b,indices:a.indices.concat(b.indices),height:best,minIndex:Math.min(a.minIndex,b.minIndex)}; clusters.splice(bj,1); clusters.splice(bi,1); clusters.push(merged);} return clusters[0];} function getLeafOrder(node,out){if(node.leaf){out.push(node.index);return;} getLeafOrder(node.left,out); getLeafOrder(node.right,out);} function getLeafPositions(order){var pos={};for(var i=0;i<order.length;i++){pos[order[i]]=i+0.5;}return pos;} function stretchHeight(h,maxH){if(!(maxH>0))return 1;var x=Math.log(1+h)/Math.log(1+maxH);return Math.pow(x,0.72);} function makeTopSegments(node,pos,maxH,segs){if(node.leaf){return {x:pos[node.index],h:0};} var l=makeTopSegments(node.left,pos,maxH,segs); var r=makeTopSegments(node.right,pos,maxH,segs); var h=stretchHeight(node.height,maxH); segs.push([l.x,l.h,l.x,h]); segs.push([r.x,r.h,r.x,h]); segs.push([l.x,h,r.x,h]); return {x:(l.x+r.x)/2,h:h};} function makeLeftSegments(node,pos,maxH,segs){if(node.leaf){return {y:pos[node.index],h:0};} var l=makeLeftSegments(node.left,pos,maxH,segs); var r=makeLeftSegments(node.right,pos,maxH,segs); var h=stretchHeight(node.height,maxH); segs.push([l.h,l.y,h,l.y]); segs.push([r.h,r.y,h,r.y]); segs.push([h,l.y,h,r.y]); return {y:(l.y+r.y)/2,h:h};} var matrix=toNumberMatrix(rawData.matrix); var rowVectorsForCluster=normalizeVectors(matrix); var colVectorsForCluster=normalizeVectors(transpose(matrix)); var rowTree=buildTree(rowVectorsForCluster); var colTree=buildTree(colVectorsForCluster); var rowOrder=[]; var colOrder=[]; getLeafOrder(rowTree,rowOrder); getLeafOrder(colTree,colOrder); var rowPos=getLeafPositions(rowOrder); var colPos=getLeafPositions(colOrder); var rowSegs=[]; var colSegs=[]; makeLeftSegments(rowTree,rowPos,rowTree.height,rowSegs); makeTopSegments(colTree,colPos,colTree.height,colSegs); var orderedRows=[]; var orderedCols=[]; var heatmap=[]; var min=Infinity; var max=-Infinity; for(var i=0;i<rowOrder.length;i++){orderedRows.push(rawData.rows[rowOrder[i]]);} for(var j=0;j<colOrder.length;j++){orderedCols.push(rawData.cols[colOrder[j]]);} for(var i=0;i<rowOrder.length;i++){for(var j=0;j<colOrder.length;j++){var v=matrix[rowOrder[i]][colOrder[j]]; if(v<min)min=v; if(v>max)max=v; heatmap.push([j,i,v]);}} transformedData={data:heatmap,rows:orderedRows,cols:orderedCols,rowDendrogramSegments:rowSegs,colDendrogramSegments:colSegs,min:min,max:max};

option={animation:false,title:{text:'関連度と距離で空間を区切る (Dendrogram Heatmap)',left:'center',top:8,textStyle:{fontSize:16,fontWeight:'bold'}},tooltip:{position:'top',formatter:function(p){if(p.seriesName!=='Heatmap'){return '';}return transformedData.rows[p.value[1]]+' × '+transformedData.cols[p.value[0]]+'
value: '+p.value[2];}},grid:[{left:'28%',top:62,width:'50%',height:116},{left:'7%',top:212,width:'16%',height:'54%'},{left:'28%',top:212,width:'50%',height:'54%'}],xAxis:[{gridIndex:0,type:'value',min:0,max:transformedData.cols.length,show:false},{gridIndex:1,type:'value',min:0,max:1,inverse:true,show:false},{gridIndex:2,type:'category',data:transformedData.cols,position:'top',axisLabel:{interval:0,rotate:-35,margin:12,fontSize:11},axisTick:{show:false},axisLine:{show:false}}],yAxis:[{gridIndex:0,type:'value',min:0,max:1,show:false},{gridIndex:1,type:'value',min:0,max:transformedData.rows.length,inverse:true,show:false},{gridIndex:2,type:'category',data:transformedData.rows,inverse:true,axisLabel:{fontSize:11,margin:10},axisTick:{show:false},axisLine:{show:false}}],visualMap:{type:'continuous',min:transformedData.min,max:transformedData.max,calculable:false,orient:'vertical',right:18,top:120,itemWidth:16,itemHeight:180,text:['High','Low'],textGap:8,textStyle:{fontSize:11,color:'#444'},inRange:{color:['#313695','#4575b4','#abd9e9','#e0f3f8','#ffffbf','#fee090','#f46d43','#d73027','#a50026']}},series:[{name:'Column dendrogram',type:'custom',coordinateSystem:'cartesian2d',xAxisIndex:0,yAxisIndex:0,silent:true,data:transformedData.colDendrogramSegments,renderItem:function(params,api){var p1=api.coord([api.value(0),api.value(1)]);var p2=api.coord([api.value(2),api.value(3)]);return {type:'line',shape:{x1:p1[0],y1:p1[1],x2:p2[0],y2:p2[1]},style:{stroke:'#5f5f5f',lineWidth:2,lineCap:'round'}};}},{name:'Row dendrogram',type:'custom',coordinateSystem:'cartesian2d',xAxisIndex:1,yAxisIndex:1,silent:true,data:transformedData.rowDendrogramSegments,renderItem:function(params,api){var p1=api.coord([api.value(0),api.value(1)]);var p2=api.coord([api.value(2),api.value(3)]);return {type:'line',shape:{x1:p1[0],y1:p1[1],x2:p2[0],y2:p2[1]},style:{stroke:'#5f5f5f',lineWidth:2,lineCap:'round'}};}},{name:'Heatmap',type:'heatmap',xAxisIndex:2,yAxisIndex:2,data:transformedData.data,progressive:0,itemStyle:{borderColor:'rgba(255,255,255,0.38)',borderWidth:1},emphasis:{itemStyle:{borderColor:'#222',borderWidth:1.2,shadowBlur:8,shadowColor:'rgba(0,0,0,0.22)'}}}]};
